reference: IT WAS HERE THAT MOST MAGNIFICENT DINNERS WERE ARRANGED IT WAS HERE THAT EXTRAORDINARY DISHES WERE CONCOCTED BY CHEFS OF WORLD WIDE FAME IT WAS HERE THAT LOBSTER A LA NEWBERG REACHED ITS HIGHEST PERFECTION AND THIS IS THE RECIPE THAT WAS FOLLOWED WHEN IT WAS PREPARED IN THE DELMONICO
text: It was here that most magnificent dinners were arranged; it was here that extraordinary dishes were concocted by chefs of worldwide fame; it was here that lobster à la Newburgh reached its highest perfection, and this is the recipe that was followed when it was prepared in the Dom Monaco.
